title: Design Parameter to KPI Calculation Model
purpose: Convert vehicle and service hub design parameters into fleet, node, urban operation, and business KPI impacts.

vehicle.vehicleWeightKg: vehicle curb weight or operating weight

operation.dispatchSuccessPct: completed dispatch divided by dispatch request

calculationLogic.payloadImpact: vehicleWeightKg ↑ → payloadKg ↓ → loadFactor ceiling ↓ → revenue efficiency ↓
calculationLogic.rangeImpact: rangeKm ↓ → refill frequency ↑ → node queue ↑ → uptime ↓
calculationLogic.refillImpact: refillTimeMin ↑ → vehicle downtime ↑ → fleet availability ↓ → dispatch success ↓
calculationLogic.berthImpact: berthCount ↓ → node throughput ↓ → queue time ↑ → fleet readiness ↓
calculationLogic.energyImpact: h2SupplyKgDay ↓ → energy constraint ↑ → dispatch authorization HOLD/STOP
calculationLogic.businessImpact: Trips × Load × Price × Days controls Revenue; Energy + Operation + Vehicle + Infrastructure controls Cost

kpiOutputs.nodeQueueMin: average queue time at service hub
kpiOutputs.tripsDay: Trips = Demand × Conversion × Matching × Dispatch × Utilization

stateRules.AUTHORIZED: fleetAvailabilityPct >= 90 and nodeQueueMin <= 10 and energyMarginPct >= 110 and contributionIndex >= 100
stateRules.HOLD: any one layer degraded but recoverable
stateRules.STOP: energyMarginPct < 90 or nodeQueueMin > 30 or dispatchSuccessPct < 80 or contributionIndex < 80
